sections.paragraph:
not used in Kal; pr. to cover, to wrap up. (Arab. غَلَفَ, Gr. καλύπτω. Comp. עוּף No. 1.)

Pual-

(1) to be covered, Son 5:14.

(2) to languish, to faint (pr. to be covered with darkness, see synn. עָטָה , עָטַף ), Isa 51:20.

Hithpael-

(1) to vail oneself, Gen 38:14.

(2) i.q. Pual No. 2, to faint, to languish with heat, Jon 4:8 with thirst, Amo 8:13.
